issues.description: GiveDon action does not capture the 'rest it' effect. The card adds a DON!! card AND rests it. Missing Rest action.
Count should be 'up to 1' — current DSL uses count:1 which is mandatory. Consider if 'up to' distinction matters in your system.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On K.O.] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
